DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: Raw command-line arguments passed to the executable.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: Executable path or executable name resolvable by the operating system.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: Pipeline that receives the new serial step.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: Step name; omitted derives a deterministic name from the executable file name.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: Process timeout seconds. 0 or omitted means no timeout.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: Existing MetaPipeline workspace to update. Defaults to the current working directory.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: Existing MetaPipeline workspace to update. Defaults to the current working directory.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: Bounded in-memory row buffer size for InsertRows. Default: 1000.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: Binding id when the selected script has multiple bindings.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: MetaTransformBinding workspace used for binding selection.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: Environment variable named by the modeled execution connection.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: Pipeline that receives the new serial step.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: Step name; omitted derives a deterministic name from the script name.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: Target table identifier when a SELECT binding has multiple targets.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: Environment variable named by the modeled target connection.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: InsertRows target type family. Default: SqlServer.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: SELECT-kind target write model. The only supported value is insert-rows.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: SQL command and bulk-copy timeout seconds. 0 or omitted means no timeout.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: MetaTransformScript workspace used for script selection.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: Existing MetaPipeline workspace to update. Defaults to the current working directory.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: Environment variable with a SQL Server connection string that can create the database.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: MetaTransformBinding workspace path used for operational run context.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: Conversion policy workspace; omitted uses built-in defaults.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: Environment variable for an initialized MetaPipeline operational DB.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: MetaTransformScript workspace path used for operational run context.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: MetaPipeline workspace. Defaults to the current working directory.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: Bounded in-memory row buffer size. Default: 1000.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: Binding id when the selected script has multiple bindings.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: MetaTransformBinding workspace containing script binding rows.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: Conversion policy workspace; omitted uses built-in defaults.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: Environment variable for the execution SQL Server connection.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: Environment variable for an initialized MetaPipeline operational DB.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: Target table identifier when a SELECT binding has multiple targets.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: Environment variable for the target SQL Server connection.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: Runtime target type family for InsertRows. Default: SqlServer.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: SQL command and bulk-copy timeout seconds. 0 or omitted means no command timeout.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: MetaTransformBinding workspace path used for operational run context.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: Conversion policy workspace; omitted uses built-in defaults.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: Environment variable for an initialized MetaPipeline operational DB.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: Pipeline task name or id to execute.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: MetaTransformScript workspace path used for operational run context.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: MetaPipeline workspace. Defaults to the current working directory.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: MetaTransformBinding workspace path used for operational run context.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: Named pipe used for orchestration worker control messages.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: Timeout while connecting to the orchestration control pipe. 0 or omitted means no timeout.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: Conversion policy workspace; omitted uses built-in defaults.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: Pipeline name to execute as a worker.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: Environment variable for an initialized MetaPipeline operational DB.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: MetaTransformScript workspace path used for operational run context.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: MetaPipeline workspace. Defaults to the current working directory.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: MetaPipeline workspace to inspect. Defaults to the current working directory.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: Report eligible rows without deleting them.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: Environment variable for the initialized MetaPipeline operational DB.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: Delete eligible diagnostic rows older than this retention window.
